name: mediaforge
description: Fully typed TypeScript wrapper for FFmpeg — fluent API, v6/v7/v8 compatible, zero native bindings
author: Qasim Ali

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p tsconfig.cjs.json && echo '{"type":"commonjs"}' > dist/cjs/package.json && chmod +x dist/esm/cli/index.js
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build && c8 --exclude='dist/**' --report-dir=. --reporter=lcov --reporter=text node --import tsx/esm --test --test-concurrency=1 --test-reporter=spec $(find tests/unit tests/integration -name '*.test.ts' | tr '\n' ' ')
scripts.coverage: c8 --exclude='dist/**' --report-dir=. --reporter=lcov --reporter=text node --import tsx/esm --test --test-concurrency=1 --test-reporter=spec $(find tests/unit tests/integration -name '*.test.ts' | tr '\n' ' ')
scripts.coverage:summary: c8 --exclude='dist/**' --report-dir=. --reporter=text-summary node --import tsx/esm --test --test-concurrency=1 $(find tests/unit tests/integration -name '*.test.ts' | tr '\n' ' ')
